executive_summary: Create scripts/coordinator-charter-audit.mjs — a durable, dedicated, READ-ONLY coordinator charter-compliance self-audit — by extracting + hardening + extending the SRE-gauges logic that today lives inline in scripts/coordinator-audit.mjs. The original 'operational version' was shipped inline 2026-06-14 and armed via a session-only CronCreate (3387717d) but the dedicated file was never persisted (lost on session end). This SD makes it durable. HARDENING: (1) DURABLE SCHEDULE — add the script to STANDARD_LOOPS in scripts/coordinator-startup-check.mjs (re-armed on every /coordinator start, so it survives a coordinator session restart), with a cron prompt that compels REMEDIATE-THEN-VERIFY (re-run to confirm 0 violations), never observe-only. (2) AUTHORITATIVE LIVENESS — reuse the sweep's PID/marker liveness (scripts/stale-session-sweep.cjs resolveCcPidFromTerminalId + the ALIVE_NO_HEARTBEAT / ALIVE_SOURCE_SIDE classification: armed-silence + live PID => alive) so long-EXEC-run workers (fresh PID / armed-silence, stale heartbeat) are counted ALIVE, not idle/dead — no false DUTY-3 flags or duplicate-assignment spray. (3) ADD the missing duty checks: resource-pool (countActiveWorktrees N/20 via lib/worktree-quota.js, fail-loud on git error), backlog-rank staleness (claimable SDs whose metadata.dispatch_rank_at is older than the 1h DISPATCH_RANK_TTL_MS or absent => the backlog-rank loop is stale), and QUIET-TICK committed-action verification (feedback category='coordinator_review': the latest row's prior_action_outcomes vs the prior row's committed_actions => N unverified). (4) FAIL-LOUD: the foundational SD + session queries must fail loud (a QUERY_ERROR marker + non-zero exit), NEVER silent-empty (a column error today silently returns [] and falsely reports 0 violations / all-clean). (5) BUG-CORRECT behavior: the WORK_ASSIGNMENT read_at exclusion (a worker with a pending unread (read_at IS NULL) WORK_ASSIGNMENT is not re-flagged idle-with-work; a read_at-stamped/drained one is not treated as pending) and completed-dep NO-false-BLOCK (a child whose dependency is COMPLETED is not counted BLOCKED; an unknown/missing dep key is flagged a dep-resolver ANOMALY, not silently inflating the BLOCKED count). The audit stays 100% READ-ONLY (detection only; remediation actions are NAMED text the coordinator agent performs — the script never writes). The SRE-gauges logic is refactored into PURE exported detector functions (data-in, verdict-out — the lib/coordinator/detectors.cjs pattern) so it is unit-testable.

functional_requirements.title: Create scripts/coordinator-charter-audit.mjs (dedicated read-only charter audit) with pure exported detectors
functional_requirements.description: New scripts/coordinator-charter-audit.mjs: a READ-ONLY self-audit covering all 6 SRE charter duties (resource-pool, liveness, flow+silent-failure, dependency-watching, capacity-forecast presence, backlog-prioritization). The per-duty gauge logic is refactored into PURE exported detector functions (in the script or a sibling lib/coordinator/charter-audit-detectors.mjs) that take already-fetched data as input and return {violation, detail, remediation} — no DB calls inside the pure functions (the script's main() fetches + calls them). Each reported violation NAMES a concrete remediation action (e.g. 'ACTION: run the worktree reaper Stage-0'). The script never writes (detection only).
acceptance_criteria: scripts/coordinator-charter-audit.mjs exists, is read-only (zero DB/file writes), and covers the 6 SRE duties
the gauge logic is in PURE exported detector functions (data-in, verdict-out) — unit-testable without a DB
every reported violation names a concrete remediation action

functional_requirements.title: Authoritative PID/marker liveness (not heartbeat-age)
functional_requirements.description: Reuse the sweep's authoritative liveness (scripts/stale-session-sweep.cjs resolveCcPidFromTerminalId + the ALIVE_NO_HEARTBEAT / ALIVE_SOURCE_SIDE rules: expected_silence_until in-window OR a live resolved PID => ALIVE even with a stale heartbeat). The liveness gauge must count a long-EXEC-run worker (fresh PID or armed-silence, heartbeat >5min) as ALIVE, not idle/dead. Do NOT re-derive a heartbeat-age-only liveness proxy.
acceptance_criteria: a worker with a live PID OR an in-window expected_silence_until + a stale heartbeat is classified ALIVE (not idle/dead)
the audit imports the sweep's liveness helper (resolveCcPidFromTerminalId / equivalent) rather than re-deriving heartbeat-age
no long-EXEC worker is miscounted as idle/dead (unit-pinned)

functional_requirements.title: Add the three missing duty checks
functional_requirements.description: (a) RESOURCE-POOL: countActiveWorktrees(repoRoot) vs MAX_WORKTREE_COUNT (20) from lib/worktree-quota.js — report N/20 + a near-cap/SATURATED violation with remediation; FAIL-LOUD on a git error (never silently 0). (b) BACKLOG-RANK STALENESS: count claimable SDs (unmet_deps=0, unclaimed, non-parent, non-terminal) whose metadata.dispatch_rank_at is older than DISPATCH_RANK_TTL_MS (1h, from scripts/worker-checkin.cjs) OR absent => 'backlog-rank loop stale (N claimable SDs un-ranked)' with remediation 're-arm/ run coordinator-backlog-rank.mjs'. (c) QUIET-TICK committed-action verification: read feedback WHERE category='coordinator_review' ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 2 — if the latest row has empty/null metadata.prior_action_outcomes while the prior row had a non-empty metadata.committed_actions => 'N committed_actions unverified (grade->action->verify broken)' with remediation 'file prior_action_outcomes for the last cycle'.
acceptance_criteria: resource-pool reports worktrees N/20 + fails loud on a git error (not silent 0)
backlog-rank staleness fires when claimable SDs have dispatch_rank_at > 1h or absent
QUIET-TICK fires when the latest coordinator_review lacks prior_action_outcomes for the prior cycle's committed_actions

functional_requirements.title: Fail-loud + read-only + remediate-then-verify
functional_requirements.description: The FOUNDATIONAL queries (strategic_directives_v2, claude_sessions) must FAIL LOUD on error: emit a '[COORD-AUDIT] QUERY_ERROR: <table>: <msg>' marker + a non-zero exit, NEVER a silent empty array (a silent column error today falsely reports 0 violations). Per-gauge sub-queries may fail-open with a visible WARN line (one gauge unavailable must not crash the whole audit). The script performs ZERO writes (read-only). Each violation line names a remediation ACTION. The cron prompt (FR-6) compels remediate-then-verify: after the coordinator agent remediates, re-run the audit and confirm 0 violations — never observe-only.
acceptance_criteria: a foundational query error emits a QUERY_ERROR marker + non-zero exit (fail-loud, not silent-empty)
the audit makes zero writes (read-only); each violation names a remediation action
a per-gauge failure fails-open with a WARN (does not crash the audit)

functional_requirements.title: Bug-correct behavior (WORK_ASSIGNMENT exclusion + completed-dep no-false-block)
functional_requirements.description: (a) A worker with a PENDING unread (session_coordination WORK_ASSIGNMENT row, read_at IS NULL) is NOT re-flagged as idle-with-work; a read_at-stamped (drained by the sweep) WORK_ASSIGNMENT is NOT treated as still-pending (bug 9fc4c3de class — drain != consume). (b) The dependency gauge must NOT count a child as BLOCKED when its dependency status is COMPLETED/terminal; an UNKNOWN/missing dep key (not in the status map) is reported as a dep-resolver ANOMALY ('dep key not found — fetch separately'), NOT silently folded into the BLOCKED count (bug d683adcf class).
acceptance_criteria: a worker with a pending unread WORK_ASSIGNMENT is excluded from the idle-with-work count (no duplicate-assignment spray)
a child whose dependency is COMPLETED is NOT counted BLOCKED
an unknown/missing dep key is flagged a dep-resolver ANOMALY, not silently counted BLOCKED

functional_requirements.title: Durable schedule (STANDARD_LOOPS) + remediate-then-verify cron prompt
functional_requirements.description: Add coordinator-charter-audit.mjs as an entry in STANDARD_LOOPS in scripts/coordinator-startup-check.mjs (key e.g. 'charter-audit', a cron cadence consistent with the other gauges e.g. '*/15' or '8,23,38,53'), with a prompt that compels remediate-then-verify: 'run node scripts/coordinator-charter-audit.mjs; for EACH violation perform the named remediation, then RE-RUN to confirm 0 violations — never observe-only.' This makes it re-armed on every /coordinator start (surviving a session restart), replacing the lost session-only CronCreate 3387717d. (Note: STANDARD_LOOPS crons are still campaign-scoped/7-day-per-arm; truly session-independent scheduling via a GHA workflow is a named follow-up if needed.)
acceptance_criteria: STANDARD_LOOPS includes the charter-audit entry (script + cron + remediate-then-verify prompt)
the entry is re-armed on /coordinator start (survives a session restart)
the cron prompt compels remediate-then-verify, never observe-only

functional_requirements.title: Unit tests
functional_requirements.description: Vitest unit tests against the PURE exported detectors (no DB): (1) a bad-column/query-error path fails loud (the main query-error handling surfaces QUERY_ERROR + a non-zero exit signal), not silent-empty; (2) idle + claimable work -> DUTY-3 (idle-with-work) violation fires; (3) a worker with a pending unread WORK_ASSIGNMENT suppresses that violation; (4) a child whose dep is COMPLETED does NOT false-BLOCK (and an unknown dep key is an ANOMALY); (5) a PID-alive/armed-silence worker with a stale heartbeat is classified ALIVE; (6) STANDARD_LOOPS includes the charter-audit entry.
acceptance_criteria: unit tests cover fail-loud, DUTY-3 idle+claimable, pending-assignment suppression, completed-dep no-false-block, PID-alive-stale-heartbeat
a test asserts STANDARD_LOOPS contains the charter-audit loop
all tests pass; detectors are pure (no DB in the function body)

technical_requirements.title: Reuse, do not re-derive
technical_requirements.description: Liveness: reuse scripts/stale-session-sweep.cjs resolveCcPidFromTerminalId + the ALIVE_NO_HEARTBEAT/ALIVE_SOURCE_SIDE semantics. Worktrees: lib/worktree-quota.js countActiveWorktrees + MAX_WORKTREE_COUNT. Dispatch-rank TTL: the DISPATCH_RANK_TTL_MS (1h) constant. Backlog-rank: scripts/coordinator-backlog-rank.mjs semantics. Do not duplicate these.

technical_requirements.title: Read-only + testable
technical_requirements.description: The audit performs ZERO writes (detection only; the coordinator agent mutates). Refactor the gauges into PURE exported detector functions (data-in, verdict-out) so they are unit-testable without a DB (the lib/coordinator/detectors.cjs pattern).

technical_requirements.title: No schema change
technical_requirements.description: Script hardening only — all referenced fields (dispatch_rank_at, committed_actions, prior_action_outcomes, read_at, expected_silence_until) already exist. No migration.

test_scenarios.expected: emits QUERY_ERROR marker + non-zero exit (fail-loud), NOT a silent empty/all-clean
live PID or in-window expected_silence_until + stale heartbeat -> ALIVE (not idle/dead)
idle+claimable -> DUTY-3 fires; a pending unread WORK_ASSIGNMENT suppresses it
completed dep -> not BLOCKED; unknown dep key -> dep-resolver ANOMALY (not silently BLOCKED)
STANDARD_LOOPS contains the charter-audit loop with a remediate-then-verify prompt

acceptance_criteria: scripts/coordinator-charter-audit.mjs exists as a durable, read-only, 6-duty charter self-audit with pure exported (testable) detectors; every violation names a remediation action
Liveness uses the sweep PID/marker source (long-EXEC/armed-silence workers counted ALIVE, not idle/dead); fail-loud on a foundational query error (never silent-empty)

The 3 new duty checks (worktrees N/20, backlog-rank staleness, QUIET-TICK committed-action verification) are present; the audit is wired into STANDARD_LOOPS (survives session restart) with a remediate-then-verify cron prompt
WORK_ASSIGNMENT read_at exclusion (no duplicate-assignment spray) + completed-dep NO-false-BLOCK are honored

Unit tests cover fail-loud / DUTY-3 / pending-assignment-suppression / completed-dep-no-false-block / PID-alive-stale-heartbeat / STANDARD_LOOPS entry; adversarial review of fail-loud + liveness + read-only clean

risks.risk: Silent-empty audit (foundational query error -> [] -> false all-clean)
risks.mitigation: fail-loud QUERY_ERROR marker + non-zero exit on the SD/session queries; unit-pinned (TS-1)

risks.risk: Heartbeat-age liveness miscounts long-EXEC/armed-silence workers as idle/dead -> false DUTY-3 + duplicate-assignment spray
risks.mitigation: reuse the sweep PID/marker + expected_silence_until liveness; WORK_ASSIGNMENT read_at exclusion; unit-pinned (TS-2/TS-3)
completed dep -> not BLOCKED; unknown dep key -> ANOMALY not silent-BLOCKED; unit-pinned (TS-4)
zero writes; remediation is NAMED text the coordinator agent performs; review asserts read-only

risks.risk: STANDARD_LOOPS is still campaign/7-day-scoped (not truly session-independent)
risks.mitigation: consistent with all 14 existing loops + survives /coordinator start restart; GHA workflow named as a follow-up for true session-independence

system_architecture.summary: A new dedicated read-only ESM audit script whose 6-duty gauge logic is pure exported detectors (data-in, verdict-out), reusing the sweep PID/marker liveness + worktree-quota + dispatch-rank TTL + the coordinator_review committed_actions ledger; wired into STANDARD_LOOPS for durable re-arming with a remediate-then-verify cron prompt; fail-loud on foundational query errors; zero writes.

components.name: scripts/coordinator-charter-audit.mjs
components.change: NEW: read-only 6-duty charter audit (main() fetches + calls pure detectors); fail-loud; names remediations (FR-1..5)

components.name: lib/coordinator/charter-audit-detectors.mjs (or inline exports)
components.change: NEW/REFACTOR: pure detector functions (data-in, verdict-out) for unit tests (FR-1, TR-2)

components.name: scripts/coordinator-startup-check.mjs
components.change: MODIFY: add the charter-audit entry to STANDARD_LOOPS (durable re-arm + remediate-then-verify prompt) (FR-6)

components.name: tests/unit/...coordinator-charter-audit.test.js
components.change: NEW: detector unit tests + STANDARD_LOOPS entry assertion (FR-7)

implementation_approach.summary: Create coordinator-charter-audit.mjs with pure exported detectors covering the 6 SRE duties; reuse the sweep PID/marker liveness, worktree-quota, dispatch-rank TTL, and the coordinator_review committed_actions ledger for the 3 new checks; fail-loud on foundational query errors; name a remediation per violation; wire into STANDARD_LOOPS with a remediate-then-verify cron prompt; honor the WORK_ASSIGNMENT read_at exclusion + completed-dep no-false-block; unit-test the detectors; adversarially review fail-loud + liveness + read-only before merge.
steps: pure detectors (6 duties) + the 3 new checks
reuse sweep liveness + worktree-quota + dispatch-rank TTL + coordinator_review ledger

smoke_test_steps.instruction: Run node scripts/coordinator-charter-audit.mjs against the live fleet
smoke_test_steps.expected_outcome: it reports per-duty gauges + any violations (each naming a concrete remediation action), using the sweep PID/marker liveness (long-EXEC/armed-silence workers counted ALIVE not idle/dead); zero writes; a foundational query/column error fails loud (QUERY_ERROR marker + non-zero exit), NEVER silently reports 0 violations

smoke_test_steps.instruction: Confirm STANDARD_LOOPS (coordinator-startup-check.mjs) contains the charter-audit entry and /coordinator start arms it
smoke_test_steps.expected_outcome: the audit is re-armed on every /coordinator start (survives a session restart, replacing the lost session-only CronCreate 3387717d); its cron prompt compels remediate-then-verify, never observe-only

smoke_test_steps.instruction: Exercise the 3 new duty checks + the bug-correct behavior (unit + a live spot-check)
smoke_test_steps.expected_outcome: worktrees N/20 (fail-loud on git error); backlog-rank staleness fires for claimable SDs with dispatch_rank_at>1h/absent; QUIET-TICK fires for an unverified prior committed_actions; a pending unread WORK_ASSIGNMENT is excluded from idle-with-work; a child whose dep is COMPLETED is not BLOCKED
fail-loud / DUTY-3 idle+claimable / pending-assignment suppression / completed-dep no-false-block / PID-alive-stale-heartbeat / STANDARD_LOOPS-entry all pass; detectors are pure (no DB)
